name: Nextleaf Solutions Ltd.
summary: Nextleaf Solutions Ltd., a cannabis extraction technology company, develops and licenses technology for the extraction, distillation, and formulation of cannabinoids in Canada. It also extracts, distills, purifies, delivers, and wholesales CBD oils and THC cannabinoid ingredients; researches and develops cannabis infused products, vapes, ingestible concentrates, and specialty extracts; and provides extraction services. The company was founded in 2015 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
